cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about what you should do when communicating with a pen pal. The options are A through D. The passage mentions a few important points. First, it says to share all letters and emails with your parents so they know you're safe. Then it says if something seems suspicious, you should stop writing. Also, never meet a pen pal in person unless a grown-up is with you. Looking at the options, option C is "be sure you are safe at any time." That seems to align with the advice given.
